nasb.text: Go forth, O daughters of Zion, And gaze on King Solomon with the crown With which his mother has crowned him On the day of his wedding, And on the day of his gladness of heart.”

esv.text: Go out, O daughters of Zion, and look upon King Solomon, with the crown with which his mother crowned him on the day of his wedding, on the day of the gladness of his heart.

cnv.text: 錫安的眾女子啊！ 你們出來看看所羅門戴著的冠冕， 就是在他結婚的日子， 在他心裡喜樂的時候， 他母親給他戴上的。

ccb.text: 锡安的少女啊， 出去看看所罗门王的风采吧！ 他头上的王冠是他母亲在他成婚那天， 在他心中欢快之日为他戴上的。
